quality.rationale: 基于任意背景度规的电磁场方程共形不变性证明，综合了逆变张量提升、行列式标度律与协变散度定义的多步代数推导

origin.question: Problem 14.21. Show that Maxwell's equations are invariant under the "conformal transformation"$$\begin{array}{l}\mathrm {g}_{\alpha \beta}\rightarrow \tilde {\mathrm {g}}_{\alpha \beta} = \mathrm {f g}_{\alpha \beta} \\\mathbf {F}_{\alpha \beta}\rightarrow \tilde {\mathbf {F}}_{\alpha \beta} = \mathbf {F}_{\alpha \beta} \\\mathrm {J}_{\mu}\rightarrow \tilde {\mathrm {J}}_{\mu} = \mathrm {f}^{- 2} \mathrm {J}_{\mu}, \\\end{array}$$where $f$ is an arbitrary function of position.
